batch_summary.note: Christmas hostile cluster: EP-0160 Dec 22 (22 msgs, FLOOD) + EP-0161 Dec 23 (12 msgs, FLOOD). ADD-003 Christmas temporal window confirmed (Dec 22-27). Two consecutive holiday-adjacent hostile episodes. CYC-003 holiday pattern now confirmed across two distinct holiday periods (Halloween, Thanksgiving, Christmas — all within 8 weeks).

primary_flags.escalation_shape: cluster — two consecutive days, Christmas Eve period

delta_profile.net_escalation: moderate Sev-1 (smaller scale than B-003 cluster but temporally significant — Christmas holiday period)

primary_flags.cycle_classification: CYC-003 — Christmas temporal window (Dec 22-27). Third holiday window confirmed across 8-week period.
primary_flags.cross_rf_note: Christmas hostile episodes consistent with holiday-trigger pattern. Combined with B-002 (Halloween) and B-003 (Nov cluster) confirms three holiday windows in first 3 months of Tier 1 conflict period.
